title: resinous flaky dutch paccheri pasta
description: a monsoon-inspired dutch dish featuring paccheri pasta, dehydrated to perfection, no onion or garlic in sight
instructions: bring the water to a boil in a large saucepan
add paccheri pasta and cook for 8 minutes, or until slightly undercooked
drain the pasta and set aside to cool, with a clean tea towel to absorb excess moisture
dehydrate the pasta in a low temperature oven (150c) for 6 hours, or until crispy
in a blender or food processor, combine sunflower seed butter, coconut milk, dried dates, lemon juice, and turmeric powder
blend until smooth and creamy, adding a little water if necessary to achieve a sauce consistency
in a large pan, combine the sauce and a pinch of salt, and cook over low heat, stirring continuously, for 10 minutes
combine the cooked paccheri pasta and sauce in a large bowl, and toss until well coated
transfer the pasta to a serving dish, and garnish with chopped fresh thyme
serve warm or at room temperature
